author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Measurement of the ratio of branching fractions $\mathcal{B}(\bar{B}^0 \to D^{*+}\tau^{-}\bar{\nu}_{\tau})/\mathcal{B}(\bar{B}^0 \to D^{*+}\mu^{-}\bar{\nu}_{\mu})$}
abstract: an analysis of the branching fraction ratio $R(D^\ast) \equiv \mathcal{B}(B^0 \to D^{\ast +} \tau^- \bar{\nu}_\tau)/\mathcal{B}(B^0 \to D^{\ast +} \mu^- \bar{\nu}_\mu), using a sample of proton-proton collision data corresponding to 3.0 fb$^{−1}$ of integrated luminosity recorded during 2011 and 2012
